name: PredictionHead
description: Norm + linear projection head for diffusion models. Configurable parameterization (epsilon, x0, or v).
code:
_ph{{_id}}_rms = np.sqrt(np.mean({{hidden}} ** 2, axis=-1, keepdims=True) + {{eps}})
_ph{{_id}}_normed = {{hidden}} / _ph{{_id}}_rms
_ph{{_id}}_W = np.random.randn({{d_out}}, {{d_model}}).astype(np.float32) * 0.02
_ph{{_id}}_b = np.zeros({{d_out}}, dtype=np.float32)
{{prediction}} = np.dot(_ph{{_id}}_normed, _ph{{_id}}_W.T) + _ph{{_id}}_b
